SEARCH
Package com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view

Class ActionsMenuView

java.lang.Object
com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.ActionsMenuView
All Implemented Interfaces:
GenreComboBoxProvider
public class ActionsMenuView extends Object implements GenreComboBoxProvider
Class that provides a GUI for "Actions" and "About" in the menubar Implements the interface to provide genre selection functionality.
Author:
Oda, Martin U

    • createFilmDialog

      public int createFilmDialog()
      Method that displays a dialog for adding a new film to the database, with fields for entering film details such as title, description, release year, genre, and rating.
      Returns:
      An integer indicating whether the dialog was confirmed or cancelled.

    • createSqlInputDialog

      public String createSqlInputDialog()
      Method that displays a dialog for entering custom SQL queries.
      Returns:
      A string containing the SQL query entered by the user, or null if cancelled.

      tableModel - The table model containing the data to display.

      Returns:
      the genre combo box

    • createGenreComboBox

      private JComboBox<String> createGenreComboBox()
      Creates and configures the genre combo box with predefined genres. Sets its preferred size and tooltip for usability.
      Returns:
      a JComboBox containing a list of predefined genres.

    • createRatingComboBox

      private JComboBox<String> createRatingComboBox()
      Creates and configures the rating combo box with predefined rating values. Sets its preferred size and tooltip for usability.
      Returns:
      a JComboBox containing a list of predefined ratings.
